creator: chrissicool@chrissicool.net
text:
Hi,

I have tried to recreate the bug here. I have set up a test box with
FreeBSD 6.3 (minimal) and installed your set of ports. Everything worked
fine here. I am not able to reproduce this. So I suspect perhaps
something in your config is wrong. Could you please post
your /etc/make.conf file here? Also, which shell are you using?

-- 

        Christian
